ddt:Target.Name: EMS3155_0700_350_V02
ddt:Target.Description:
Motorisation H5FT Vehicle: P12C ECUs: EMS3155 Logiciels: 0700_350 ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Auteur: Ghigeanu Cosmin ------------------------------------------------------------------------
Documents de référence: DID (RENAULT) : MCD_Config_0700_300_CR2_DG_DGT_DAT_0_19.2.0_RI_22.3 DID (FOURNISSEUR) : "a_dg_dgt_das_msgdiag_rd6_xx_g_a(4.3)" DTC : "LM 34" Base de depart EMS3155_0700_300_V01 Base transverse utilsé: LM 34 ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Historique V02: - Added Renault DIDs ($21A3, $215B) to the OBD End Of Line screen
V01 - Added Auto-ident: 177($B1) "001" "0700" "3500" - Items_Bases_DDT2000_S1434
------------------------------------------------------------------------ OLDER VERSIONS ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Ghigeanu Cosmin - EMS3155_0700_300_V01
- Added Renault DIDs: $20A3 $20AB $20AD $20C3 $20C4 $20C6 $20C8 $20C9 $20CA $20CB $20D3 $20D4 $20D5 $22BE $2893 $2945 $2946 $2947 $2948 $2955 $F453 $F6E8 $F810 - IO to LM34 - Items_Bases_DDT2000_S1423
Ghigeanu Cosmin - EMS3155_0700_250_V01
- Evolution DID $FEE3 - Added Auto-Ident: $B0_0700_250 - Items_Bases_DDT2000_S1410
Anton Alexandra - EMS3155_0700_200_V01:
- Added Auto-Ident 0700_200 Vdiag $BF - Added Renault DIDs: $20A5 $20A6 $20A8 $20A9 $20AA $20AC $20B5 $20B6 $20B7 $20B8 $20B9 $20BA $20BC $20BD $24DD $292C $29B0 $29B1 $20C0 - Updated DID supplier $FD4D according CDC - Updated fault type list for DTC $114F, $1150 - Deleted screens R/W in ''Lecture-Ecriture => Adaptatifs de richesse'' for DIDs: $2851,$2852,$2863,$2864,$2865,$2866,$2867 and added screens R/W for DIDs $288D,$288E,$20CC,$20CE,$20CF - Items_Bases_DDT2000_S1349

Data.Name: DTCFailureType

Item.Text: The base DTC provides the complete description of the failure
No Bus Signal / Message Specific SubType
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Battery or Open
Current Flow Below a Specified Range
Current Flow Above a Specified Range
Circuit Resistance Below a Specified Range
Circuit Resistance Above a Specified Range
Electrical Conditions detected during a few moment
Signal Amplitude Below a Specified Range
Signal Amplitude Above a Specified Range
Signal remains Low when Transitions are Expected
Signal remains High when Transitions are Expected
Improper Signal Shape (plot of Amplitude with Respect to Time)
Circuit which is Superimposed a Signal Voltage
Low Pulse is too Narrow with Respect to Time
Low Pulse is too Wide with Respect to Time
High Pulse is too Narrow with Respect to Time
High Pulse is too Wide with Respect to Time
Incorrect Number of Cycles in a Given Time Period
Mismatch between Hardware Connected and Hardware Expected
Internal Temperature Above a Specified Range
Some Part of the Program has not been Enabled
Some Part of the Program has been Disabled
Need to Program Sub System (or Vehicle) Option Content
Two (or More) Input Parameters compared for Plausibility
Function actived for Greater than a Specified Time Period
Fewer Transitions than a Specified Number
More Transitions than a Specified Number
Correct Change of parameter(s) in Response to a Particular Event has not been detected
Detection of a System Event that was not caused by System itself
No Motion Detected in response to Energizing the Component
No Motion Detected in response to Closing the Component
No Motion Detected in response to Opening the Component
Excessive Duration in response to Energizing the Component
Unable to Move the Component to the Emergency Position
Unable to Move the Component to the Commanded Position
Incorrectly Adjusted or Aligned Component Detected
Actuator Operational but Driven Device not Operating
Component has an Unexpected Gas (or Liquid) Flow
Fluid Level too Low for Proper Operation
Validity Bit equal to 'invalid' or Post Processing Invalid
Corresponding Rolling Count Value being unproperly Updated
Message with an Incorrect Protection Calculation
Circuit Quantity Below a Specified Range
Circuit Quantity Above a Specified Range
Circuit Quantity Not Plausible given to Operating Conditions
Component Parameter Outside its Expected Range
Component Performance Outside its Expected Range
Component Operating in an Incorrect Way
Component Operation Prevented by an Obstruction

Label.Text: Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
Danc ce cas le calculateur est déprotégé et n'interdit pas le démarrage moteur
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car il ne reçoit pas les trames de la BCM: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car la BCM ne répond pas correctement: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'a pas authentifié la clé ou le badge
-> L'ECM n'est pas monté sur le véhicule sur lequel il a appris le code
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est vierge et protégé car la BCM n'envoie pas la clé secrète: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'est pas autorisée à envoyer la clé secrète
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est "autoprotégé" et n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> L'ECM a subit une tentative "d'intrusion" ou a détécté une erreur interne (EEPROM, FLASH...)

Label.Text: Readiness code completion PID 1 octet A + B
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet C + D
DATA BYTE B: On-board diagnostic evaluation and Continuous monitoring tests
DATA BYTE D: Status of tests run at least once per trip
Readiness code completion PID 1 octet B BIT B5/B6 - octet D BIT B7
DATABYTE B, BIT 6: CC monitoring readiness
DATABYTE D, BIT 7: EGR system monitoring
BIT 7: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')
Test complete or not applicable = 0 soit diag joué
Test not complete = 1 soit diag non joué
DATA BYTE A: Number of DTC and MIL lamp status
Number of memorized emission-related powertrain failures
DATABYTE B, BIT 5: Fuel system monitoring readiness
DATA BYTE D: Status of test run at least once per trip
DATA BYTE C: Supported tests run at least once per trip
Learning state of the TDC sensor
